message:
bd-2x5xc: Unified SPORK error taxonomy

Add SporkError enum wrapping all domain errors (Start, Stop, Compile,
Spawn, Call, Cast, Info) with SporkSeverity classification (Transient
vs Permanent). Includes From conversions for all 9 source error types,
Display/Error impls, domain() tag, and severity monotonicity. Added
SporkError to prelude. 16 tests covering From conversions, severity
classification, domain tags, display format, source chain, ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
